item.title: About
item.description:
Hi, I’m Marco — a Facility & Project Manager with 10+ years of experience running operations, infrastructure, and multi-site projects in fast-paced retail and tech environments.

I started my career in the Apple ecosystem, working my way from store assistant to Area Sales Manager before transitioning into Facility Management — a move driven by my curiosity for technology and a desire to build and optimise systems at scale. Over the years I’ve managed 60+ locations across Italy, led cross-functional teams, and implemented digital tools — including CMMS platforms — to improve efficiency and sustainability across entire retail networks.

item.title: Contact
item.description:
I’m currently based in Voorburg, Netherlands, and actively looking for new opportunities in facility management, IT operations, or technology-driven environments.

Feel free to reach out — I’m always happy to connect.

Get in touch
📧 Email marco@bassanim.com
💼 LinkedIn linkedin.com/in/bassanim
📍 Location Voorburg, Netherlands
📞 Phone +39 320 0507620

CV

Looking for a summary of my experience?

Download my CV

I typically respond within 24 hours.

item.title: Experience
item.description:
Juice S.p.A. — Milan, Italy

Facility & Project Manager | 2019 – 2025

Promoted from Area Sales Manager to lead all facility operations for a 60+ store Apple Premium Partner network — a move driven by the company’s recognition of my technical aptitude and my curiosity for continuous learning.

  • Oversaw maintenance, operations, and safety compliance across 60+ retail stores
  • Built and led a dedicated facility team of five
  • Managed relationships with 30+ external vendors
  • Delivered 20+ store openings, relocations, and refurbishments, including the integration of a competitor chain with 30+ locations
  • Implemented a CMMS platform, improving maintenance tracking and response times
  • Drove sustainability and energy-saving initiatives across the network
  • Supervised a fleet of 15+ vehicles and managed corporate travel logistics

Juice S.p.A. — Milan, Italy

Area Sales Manager | 2016 – 2019

item.title: Skills
item.description:
Project & Facility Management

  • Multi-site operations and infrastructure oversight
  • End-to-end project delivery — store openings, relocations, refurbishments
  • CMMS implementation and maintenance management
  • Vendor management and contract negotiation
  • Fleet management and corporate travel logistics
  • Compliance, safety standards, and local regulations
  • Team building, mentoring, and day-to-day leadership

Technology & Tools

  • AutoCAD, Wrike, Zendesk
  • Microsoft 365 & SharePoint, Google Workspace
  • Virtualisation and homelab infrastructure
  • Cloud technologies and system administration
  • Apple Certified Support Professional (ACSP)
  • Apple Certified Technical Coordinator (ACTC)

People & Communication

  • Bridging technical and non-technical stakeholders
  • Guiding individuals and teams in adopting the right digital tools
  • Training, coaching, and knowledge transfer
  • B2B relationship management and client partnerships

Languages

Language Level
Italian Native
English C1 — Advanced
French B1 — Intermediate
Dutch A2 — Basic
Spanish A2 — Basic
